conj.statement: "unified_policy_framework": "A layered materialist-historicist policy framework operating at three scales: (1) *National Calibration Layer*—mandates rejection of teleology (Subtopic 2), anti-determinism (Subtopic 3), and anti-Eurocentric scaffolding (Subtopic 4), enforced via NCHS compliance audits; (2) *State Contextualization Layer*—allows weighted determinant calibration (e.g., labor/ecology trade-offs) and epistemological pluralism (Subtopic 5), with divergence tracking against national baselines (Subtopic 4); (3) *County Implementation Layer*—requires granular engagement with local materialities (e.g., land tenure, infrastructure access) and co-interpretation with Indigenous/epistemic communities (Subtopic 1 & 5), using intellectual archaeology to surface suppressed infrastructural histories. All layers must integrate *anti-reductionist safeguards* (Subtopic 5) and *causal pluralism* (Subtopic 3) via joint review panels.",
